title: Finout Cost Query
description: A cost query request used to analyze cloud spend using user-defined Finout Views, supporting date ranges and filters for granular cost insights.

viewId.description: The ID of the Finout View to query.

date.description: Optional date range for the query. Must either be fully specified or omitted entirely.

unixTimeMillSecondsStart.description: Start of the date range in Unix milliseconds (UTC).

unixTimeMillSecondsEnd.description: End of the date range in Unix milliseconds (UTC).

filter.description: A filter object used to narrow query results, supporting logical AND/OR grouping and various operators.

costCenter.description: The cost center to filter on (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure).

key.description: The MegaBill key to filter by.

displayName.description: The display name for the filter field.

value.description: The value or values to match against.
